name: Runaway Wagon
flavor: High Noon — a spooked team bolts and drags the wagon across the street, scattering everyone. Reskin of the Transmogrifier.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): swap the positions of any two Hands in play (with their tokens), no matter whose they are. Mark their spots with Move tokens before swapping.

effects.text: Swap any two Hands' positions, carrying their tokens.
